top.title: UN human rights chief calls on US to conclude probe into Iran school strike
top.summary: The strike - which killed at least 168 people, mostly children - "evoked a visceral horror", Volker Türk said.

top.title: Iran-backed hackers breach FBI director Kash Patel's personal emails
top.summary: A hacker group shares Patel's purported resume and  photos of him on its website along with a statement that says, "This is just our beginning."

top.title: Spanish woman who died through euthanasia failed by state, say critics
top.summary: Noelia Castillo died on Thursday evening in a Barcelona hospital, after a protracted legal battle with her own father.

top.title: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
top.summary: The changes will see the recommended retail price of the PS5 rise from £479.99 to £569.99 in the UK.

top.title: Lloyds bank reveals IT glitch affected almost half a million customers
top.summary: In a letter to the Treasury Select Committee, Lloyds apologised and said some compensation had been paid.

top.title: Just Eat and Autotrader among firms investigated in fake reviews probe
top.summary: The UK's competition watchdog says it is looking at five firms in its investigation into misleading online reviews.

title.#text: The latest in data centers, AI, and energy
Anker’s 160W Prime Charger can power three devices at once, and it’s $50 off
Nuki’s one-touch retrofit smart lock got its first-ever discount
